title: colignonia rufopilosa
intro: Colignonia rufopilosa, also known as the 'Ruby-Flowered Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows as a shrub or small tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Colignonia rufopilosa include treating fever, cough, and digestive issues, with herbal preparations typically involving infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and bark.
